model_architecture: Dual-Stream MLP + Attention Gate: wav2vec2-base frozen (multi-layer weighted avg: layers 6,9,12) + Extended Acoustic Features (191-dim) + BatchNorm + Residual

feature_extraction.stream_1: wav2vec2-base (frozen) — mean-pooled embeddings averaged across hidden layers 6, 9, 12 (768-dim)
feature_extraction.stream_2: Extended acoustic features (189-dim): MFCC-mean (40) + MFCC-std (40) + Delta-MFCC (40) + Delta2-MFCC (40) + Spectral Contrast (7) + Spectral Bandwidth (2) + Spectral Flatness (2) + Chroma (12) + ZCR (2) + Spectral Rolloff (2) + RMS (2)
feature_extraction.fusion: Attention Gate — per-sample dynamic weighting of both streams

training.augmentation: Genuine: Gaussian noise, time stretch, pitch shift, shift  |  Deepfake: light Gaussian noise, shift
